page_metadata.biotools__summary: DICODerma is a tool and a preliminary standard to reconcile the best of both worlds - the simplicity of consumer image tools and the DICOM and PACS-based enterprise imaging infrastructure.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DICODerma is a tool and a preliminary standard to reconcile the best of both worlds - the simplicity of consumer image tools and the DICOM and PACS-based enterprise imaging infrastructure.
